top.name: Ensnaring Web
top.rules_text: Prepare a web of glyphs on a 2-tile radius within 4. Enemies that enter are slowed 1 turn. Lasts 3 turns.

bottom.name: Rearm
bottom.rules_text: Refresh all of your triggered glyphs (they become active again). Gain 2 Weave.

upgrades.description: The web also bites. Rearm banks more.

changes.value: Prepare a web (radius 2) within 4. Enemies entering take 3 and are slowed 1 turn. Lasts 3 turns.
Refresh all of your triggered glyphs. Gain 3 Weave.

upgrades.description: Choking Web: roots instead of slowing.

changes.value: Prepare a web (radius 2) within 4. Enemies entering take 3 and are rooted 1 turn. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: Rearm & Reload: also draw a card.

changes.value: Refresh all of your triggered glyphs. Draw 1 card. Gain 3 Weave.

upgrades.description: Widow's Web: radius 3 and heavier damage.

changes.value: Prepare a web (radius 3) within 4. Enemies entering take 5 and are rooted 1 turn. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: Overcharge Glyphs: refreshed glyphs deal +2 until end of turn.

changes.value: Refresh all triggered glyphs; they deal +2 this turn. Draw 1 card. Gain 3 Weave.

upgrades.description: The Tangle: anything caught in the web is Named.

changes.value: Prepare a permanent web (radius 3). Enemies entering take 6 and are Named (half damage, cannot move) 1 turn.

upgrades.description: Total Rearm: refresh, empower, trigger the whole web.

changes.value: Refresh all glyphs (+3 this turn) and trigger them all without consuming. Draw 1. Gain 3 Weave.
